title: Concordant Bazaar — Morning Rush
subtitle: Velka opens the central row. Three things shouldn't be there.
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1000 600' width='1000' height='600' style='background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3b2a1a,#1a1208)'><rect x='0' y='460' width='1000' height='140' fill='#5a3b1d'/><rect x='100' y='200' width='160' height='260' fill='#7a5230' stroke='#3a2418' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='320' y='180' width='180' height='280' fill='#8b5e35' stroke='#3a2418' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='560' y='210' width='160' height='250' fill='#7a5230' stroke='#3a2418' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='780' y='200' width='160' height='260' fill='#7a5230' stroke='#3a2418' stroke-width='3'/><text x='180' y='250' fill='#fde68a' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>Velka</text><circle cx='420' cy='240' r='14' fill='#dc2626'/><circle cx='420' cy='260' r='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='420' y='285' fill='#fda4af' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>fruit stall</text><rect x='220' y='320' width='12' height='40' fill='#94a3b8'/><text x='226' y='378' fill='#cbd5e1' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>scroll</text><circle cx='840' cy='340' r='10' fill='#fbbf24'/><text x='840' y='370' fill='#fde68a' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>brass coin</text><polygon points='620,330 640,300 660,330' fill='#a78bfa'/><text x='640' y='350' fill='#c4b5fd' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>pendant</text></svg>

title: Watch Briefing Room
subtitle: Captain Ren's morning roll-call. Find the off-rotation gear.
svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1000 600' width='1000' height='600' style='background:#1e293b'><rect x='0' y='480' width='1000' height='120' fill='#334155'/><rect x='80' y='200' width='260' height='280' fill='#475569' stroke='#0f172a' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='380' y='180' width='240' height='300' fill='#64748b' stroke='#0f172a' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='660' y='200' width='260' height='280' fill='#475569' stroke='#0f172a' stroke-width='3'/><text x='500' y='220' fill='#e2e8f0' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle'>WATCH</text><circle cx='160' cy='320' r='8' fill='#dc2626'/><text x='160' y='345' fill='#fca5a5' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>red badge</text><rect x='420' y='380' width='20' height='80' fill='#94a3b8'/><text x='430' y='475' fill='#cbd5e1' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>baton</text><polygon points='760,330 780,310 800,330 780,350' fill='#fbbf24'/><text x='780' y='370' fill='#fde68a' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>captain pin</text><circle cx='870' cy='420' r='10' fill='#10b981'/><text x='870' y='450' fill='#6ee7b7' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>green coin</text></svg>

title: Archive Curator's Chamber
subtitle: Asbir's audience room. Find what's hiding.

subtitle: Baren works the common room. Find the contraband.

subtitle: What the urchin keeps. Find four trinkets.

title: Brawling Pit — Sand & Sweat
subtitle: Taro Sandren's domain. Spot the missing gear.

title: Northern Woodline — Dawn Patrol
subtitle: Ranger Kiren has been tracking a print no catalogue lists. Spot the signs.
